description: Privacy-preserving DNA similarity computation. Decrypts two sets of 4 encrypted SNP markers inside the TEE, computes Hamming similarity, and returns a score 0-100.

inputs.name: user_a_marker_0
inputs.description: Encrypted SNP marker 0 for user A (0=A,1=T,2=G,3=C)

inputs.name: user_a_marker_1
inputs.description: Encrypted SNP marker 1 for user A

inputs.name: user_a_marker_2
inputs.description: Encrypted SNP marker 2 for user A

inputs.name: user_a_marker_3
inputs.description: Encrypted SNP marker 3 for user A

inputs.name: user_b_marker_0
inputs.description: Encrypted SNP marker 0 for user B

inputs.name: user_b_marker_1
inputs.description: Encrypted SNP marker 1 for user B

inputs.name: user_b_marker_2
inputs.description: Encrypted SNP marker 2 for user B

inputs.name: user_b_marker_3
inputs.description: Encrypted SNP marker 3 for user B

outputs.name: similarity_score
outputs.description: Percentage of matching SNP markers (0-100). Computed as: matching_count * 25.

callback.discriminator_note: sha256('global:match_callback')[0..8] — precompute and embed in setup_devnet.mjs

computation.description: For each of the 4 marker positions: decrypt both user values, check equality, count matches, return matches * 25 as u8 similarity score.
computation.privacy_guarantee: Neither user's raw marker values leave the Arcium TEE. Only the aggregate similarity score is returned, revealing no individual genotype data.
